name: workflow
description: Task-board work framework for hobby/solo repos: groom, work, batch-work, acceptance-verifier gate, decision log, cross-repo status, plus framework-init scaffolding and framework-doctor validation/cleanup. Tasks are files in workflow/<status>/ folders (folder = status, moves are git mv), board view via a shipped ./workflow/status script, repo specifics in a workflow/AGENTS.md contract.

interface.shortDescription: Folder-based task board and work loop for solo/hobby repos
interface.longDescription: A unified work framework shared across repos. Tasks are single files in workflow/<status>/ folders — the folder IS the status, so every transition is one git mv. Ready is ordered by sparse priority lines; a shipped ./workflow/status script prints the board. Repo-specific facts (validation commands, verify skills, doc routing) live in a workflow/AGENTS.md contract the skills read first. Skills: groom refines a task into an implementable spec, work implements one task with an adversarial acceptance-verifier gate and an atomic completion commit, batch-work runs queued tasks unattended, decision appends to the repo's decision log, status shows all boards across repos, framework-init scaffolds a new repo, framework-doctor validates the structure and keeps shipped files current.
defaultPrompt: Use $work to implement the top Ready task from the board.
